title: UKI Senior Paid Search Executive
description: ### **UKI****Senior Paid Search Executive** We’re looking for a Senior Paid Search Executive to join our Search team at Flutter UK \& Ireland. This role plays a critical part in driving high quality acquisition at scale across the UK \& Ireland through best\-in\-class paid search execution. You’ll take senior ownership of performance across Google Ads, Microsoft/Bing, and Apple Search Ads, helping to shape strategy, lead optimisation, and deliver sustained commercial growth across some of Flutter’s most recognisable brands. Success in this role will be measured through your ability to scale profitable volume, improve CPA and LTV, and continuously evolve our paid search approach through testing, automation and innovation. As a Senior Paid Search Executive, you’ll be a core member of the central UK \& Ireland Search team, working across a broad portfolio of market\-leading Flutter brands including Betfair, Paddy Power and Sky Betting \& Gaming. You’ll combine hands\-on campaign ownership with a more strategic lens, supporting not just execution but also the evolution of our approach to paid search at scale. You’ll play a key role in shaping best practice across the channel, mentoring junior team members, and working closely with Paid Search Managers and cross\-functional stakeholders to ensure our activity is delivering against clear commercial and customer outcomes. The role sits at the intersection of performance, automation, creative testing and commercial strategy, with accountability across always\-on acquisition, trading moments, and new product or market launches. This is a high impact role offering the opportunity to influence major budgets in a fast\-paced, performance\-driven environment. ### **What you’ll do** * Lead the day\-to\-day management, optimisation and scaling of Paid Search activity across Google Ads, Microsoft/Bing and Apple Search Ads * Take ownership of performance against CPA, volume, LTV and wider commercial targets * Shape bid strategies, budget allocation, account structure and automation frameworks * Drive continuous testing across keywords, creative formats and platform innovation * Provide hands\-on leadership and guidance to more junior team members within the Search team * Work closely with Senior Search Managers to plan channel strategy aligned to UK \& Ireland business priorities * Partner with brand, product, analytics and commercial teams to unlock performance opportunities * Deliver clear insight, performance narratives and recommendations to senior stakeholders * Support major trading moments, regulatory changes and strategic growth initiatives across the region ### **How you’ll do it** Strong proven experience managing Paid Search at scale across Google Ads and Microsoft/Bing (Apple Search Ads experience is highly desirable) * Deep understanding of performance marketing principles including CPA, ROAS, LTV, incrementality and attribution * Experience managing seven\-figure budgets in fast\-paced, high\-volume environments * Advanced optimisation, testing and automation capability * Highly data\-driven with strong analytical and problem\-solving skills * Confident acting as a senior stakeholder within a cross\-functional environment * Strong communication skills with the ability to influence at multiple levels * Experience within gaming, gambling, fintech, subscription or other regulated digital industries is desirable ### **What’s in it for you:** * Flexible ways of working – home or office, it’s your choice! * £1,000 learning fund * Twice\-yearly bonus (with part of it guaranteed!) * Pension contribution scheme * Private healthcare * Access to thousands of Udemy courses * Invest via the Company Sharesave Scheme * 16 hours paid volunteering time per year * Unlimited holiday ### **About Flutter** Flutter is the world’s leading online sports betting and iGaming operator, with a market leading position in the US and across the world. Our ambition is to change our industry for the better, making use of our significant scale and challenger mentality. By Changing the Game, we believe we can deliver long\-term growth while promoting a positive, sustainable future for the industry. We are well\-placed to do so through the distinctive, global advantages of the Flutter Edge, which gives our brands access to group\-wide benefits to stay ahead of the competition, as well as our clear vision for sustainability through our Positive Impact Plan. Flutter operates a diverse portfolio of leading online sports betting and iGaming brands including FanDuel, Sky Betting \& Gaming, Sportsbet, PokerStars, Paddy Power, Sisal, tombola, Betfair, MaxBet, Junglee Games and Adjarabet. ### **About Flutter UK \& Ireland** The UK \& Ireland region of Flutter unites some of the biggest brands in the betting and gaming industry; Betfair, Paddy Power, PokerStars, Sky Betting \& Gaming and tombola. At Flutter UK \& Ireland, we strive for the next level and drive innovation to set the pace as leaders, putting our **customers first, always** . We **win together** through team spirit and unparalleled dedication. When we’re **free to be ourselves** , we thrive and unleash our unique talents —creating a culture that empowers our people to **change the game.** We see opportunity everywhere and there is always more to discover... **We’re working to be an inclusive employer. We encourage people from all backgrounds, ways of thinking and working to apply. Everyone brings different perspectives and experiences; you don't have to meet all the requirements listed to apply for this role.** **If you need any adjustments to make this role work for you let us know, and we’ll see how we can accommodate them.**

title: VP Analyst - AI & Application Services (Remote: Europe)
description: **About the role:** *This individual will work remotely with a global team and needs the ability to support C\-level clients who themselves are global is key.* This VP Analyst will provide actionable insights to C\-level Gartner clients who are General Managers, responsible for planning, creating, and managing Enterprise Application Services practices and offerings in both corporate and cloud environments. This role will also predict and project how application services market trends will impact end clients in their service solutions initiatives and decisions. The successful candidate will have a thought leading vision for how application services will evolve, and what Gartner's service provider clients in this market must do to succeed. We look for practical, operational and commercial experience creating and bringing to market services solutions, the creation of differentiated services offerings, driving impact for clients, as well as growth and profitability at the practice level. The ideal candidate will possess strong, broad industry experience across various application services and multiple application stacks. They should have experience that could be applied across multiple application stacks (Oracle, SAP, Workday, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Microsoft, etc) not just a single stack. They will understand buyer needs and provider constraints in consulting, implementation, management and support of enterprise application services. **What you will do:** **Research and Analysis** * Conduct in\-depth qualitative and quantitative research on services supporting the emerging AI capabilities across multiple application stacks * Design and implement comprehensive market research studies to identify trends, competitive dynamics, and growth opportunities in the apps services sector as a result of the move to AI capabilities * Develop market forecasts and predictions about AI \& application services adoption, implementation challenges, and potential business impacts * Analyze complex datasets to extract meaningful insights into AI \& app services market trends, competitor movements, and customer needs * Monitor and evaluate the competitive landscape for service providers supporting application megavendors and AI application specialists, across the full range of services, from consulting, through implementation and managed services **Content Development and Thought Leadership** * Create compelling, high\-quality research reports and thought leadership content on AI application services and their implications for major IT service providers. * Develop frameworks, methodologies, and best practices to help service providers successfully industrialize their application services offerings * Ideate, scope, and produce forward\-looking research that addresses critical challenges faced by business and technology leaders * Prepare and deliver tailored briefings for clients that translate complex technical concepts into actionable business insights * Contribute to research agenda development by identifying emerging areas of interest in AI services and application services * Collaborate with Gartner colleagues in the development of research positions related to AI application services **Client Engagement and Advisory** * Serve as a trusted advisor to C\-level clients on AI services strategy, implementation approaches, and ecosystem partners for deployment * Conduct briefings and advisory sessions to help C\-level clients navigate complex AI decisions and investments * Present research findings at industry events, webinars, and client conferences * Build and maintain relationships with industry thought leaders, vendors, and practitioners in the AI space * Support sales teams by providing expert insights during C\-level client conversations **What you will need:** **Technical Knowledge relevant to Application Services \& AI Services** * Deep understanding of AI technologies including machine learning, natural language processing, and generative AI, as used in the application stack, and as they pertain to service delivery * Deep understanding of agentic AI, including its use to disintermediate other application and business processes in the end user operations stack * Deep understanding of cloud operating models, the role of cloud in supporting AI applications, and the importance of the platform layer to application megavendor strategies **Research And Analytical Skills** * Strong qualitative and quantitative research methodology expertise * Advanced analytical thinking and ability to synthesize complex information into clear insights * Experience designing research frameworks and data collection methods * Ability to identify patterns, trends, and correlations in large datasets * Critical thinking skills to question assumptions and validate findings **Business and Industry Knowledge** * Comprehensive understanding of IT services markets * Knowledge of AI application implementation challenges across different industries for Cloud Services * Understanding of regional differences in AI capabilities, adoption trends, regulatory requirements, etc for cloud models. * Awareness of ethical, regulatory, and governance issues surrounding AI deployment * Understanding of the impact of AI on enterprise cloud services procurement and decision\-making processes * Ability to translate Services technical capabilities into business value propositions **Communication And Presentation Skills** * Exceptional writing abilities with experience creating research reports and thought leadership content * Strong presentation skills and ability to communicate complex topics to non\-technical audiences * Experience conducting interviews with industry experts and C\-level General Managers * Ability to facilitate discussions and working sessions with diverse stakeholder groups * Clear communication of data\-driven insights that drive business decisions * Ability to communicate with technology and business leaders **Education And Experience** * Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; Master's degree or PhD preferred in fields such as Business, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, or related disciplines * Demonstrated expertise in AI technologies and their business applications * Prior experience at a research and advisory firm, consulting organization, or similar role highly valued * Track record of producing high\-quality research content and client\-facing deliverables **Personal Attributes** * Intellectual curiosity and passion for understanding emerging technologies * Self\-motivated with ability to work independently while contributing to team objectives * Comfort with ambiguity and ability to navigate complex, evolving subject matter \#Remote **Who are we?** At Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT), we guide the leaders who shape the world. Our mission relies on expert analysis and bold ideas to deliver actionable, objective business and technology insights, helping enterprise leaders and their teams succeed with their mission\-critical priorities. Since our founding in 1979, we’ve grown to 21,000 associates globally who support \~14,000 client enterprises in \~90 countries and territories. We do important, interesting and substantive work that matters. That’s why we hire associates with the intellectual curiosity, energy and drive to want to make a difference. The bar is unapologetically high. So is the impact you can have here. **What makes Gartner a great place to work?** Our vast, virtually untapped market potential offers limitless opportunities – opportunities that may not even exist right now – for you to grow professionally and flourish personally. How far you go is driven by your passion and performance. We hire remarkable people who collaborate and win as a team. Together, our singular, unifying goal is to deliver results for our clients. Our teams are inclusive and composed of individuals from different geographies, cultures, religions, ethnicities, races, genders, sexual orientations, abilities and generations. We invest in great leaders who bring out the best in you and the company, enabling us to multiply our impact and results. This is why, year after year, we are recognized worldwide as a great place to work. **What do we offer?** Gartner offers world\-class benefits, highly competitive compensation and disproportionate rewards for top performers. In our hybrid work environment, we provide the flexibility and support for you to thrive — working virtually when it's productive to do so and getting together with colleagues in a vibrant community that is purposeful, engaging and inspiring. Ready to grow your career with Gartner? Join us. The policy of Gartner is to provide equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, citizenship status, age, national origin, ancestry, disability, veteran status, or any other legally protected status and to seek to advance the principles of equal employment opportunity. Gartner is committed to being an Equal Opportunity Employer and offers opportunities to all job seekers, including job seekers with disabilities. If you are a qualified individual with a disability or a disabled veteran, you may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Company’s career webpage as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by calling Human Resources at \+1 (203\) 964\-0096 or by sending an email to ApplicantAccommodations@gartner.com. Job Requisition ID:109243 By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you have read and agree to the country or regional recruitment notice linked below applicable to your place of residence. Gartner Applicant Privacy Link: https://jobs.gartner.com/applicant\-privacy\-policy **For efficient navigation through the application, please only use the back button within the application, not the back arrow within your browser.**

title: Veterinary Nurse - Small Animal
description: **Veterinary Nurse – Small Animal** ----------------------------------- **AllPets Veterinary Hospital, Drogheda, Co. Louth** **Full\-time, Permanent** **Salary up to €40,000 DOE** ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ### **A Role Where You Can Learn, Grow and Feel Supported** AllPets Veterinary Hospital is looking for a Veterinary Nurse to join our busy, modern small animal hospital in Drogheda. This is a permanent opportunity within a large, experienced team where learning is part of everyday life and support is always close at hand. Whether you’re newly qualified or bring years of experience, this is a role where you’ll be encouraged to develop your skills, build confidence, and shape a career that suits your interests. ### **A Hospital Environment That Elevates Your Skills** Working in a well\-equipped, high\-standard hospital setting, you’ll be involved across all aspects of nursing \- from theatre and anaesthesia to inpatient care, consults, and client support. For newer graduates, this is an ideal place to start. You’ll be surrounded by experienced vets and nurses who are invested in your development, offering guidance, mentoring, and hands\-on support as you build your confidence in clinical practice. For more experienced nurses, the opportunity here is to take your skills further. With access to advanced equipment, a varied caseload, and colleagues with certifications across multiple disciplines, you’ll have the environment and support to refine your expertise and develop a clinical niche. ### **Develop Your Career, Your Way** We actively support professional development at every stage. If you have a particular area of interest; whether that’s anaesthesia, ECC, medicine, dentistry or beyond; you’ll be encouraged to pursue it. We offer full funding for postgraduate certificates, alongside a strong culture of continuous learning through in\-house training, coaching, and collaboration with highly experienced clinicians. This is a practice where your ambition is supported, not limited. ### **A Supportive and Collaborative Team** AllPets is home to a large, friendly, and highly skilled team, including multiple veterinary surgeons and nurses with additional certifications in areas such as surgery, medicine, dentistry and ECC. You’ll be working in an environment where teamwork is central, communication is open, and everyone plays a valued role in delivering excellent patient care. It’s a place where you can ask questions, share ideas, and feel genuinely supported day to day. ### **A Modern, Well\-Equipped Hospital** Our Drogheda hospital is fully equipped to support high\-quality veterinary care, with digital and dental X\-ray, ultrasound, in\-house laboratory equipment, and excellent surgical facilities. We are also proud to be a Gold\-accredited ISFM Cat Friendly Clinic, reflecting our commitment to patient welfare and clinical excellence. ### **A Rota That Works for You** This is a full\-time role, typically based around a 37\.5\-hour working week. Our rota is designed to be fair and sustainable, with a shared weekend commitment and no overnight out\-of\-hours work. We are also open to discussing part\-time or flexible working arrangements to suit your lifestyle and commitments. ### **A Package That Supports You** Alongside a competitive salary, you’ll benefit from a comprehensive package designed to support your wellbeing and career progression. This includes: #### **Work life balance** * 22 days annual leave entitlement * Birthday leave #### **Focus on employee wellbeing** * Paid Maternity, Paternity and Adoptive leave packages * Cycle to work scheme * EAP and wellbeing centre access * Paid bereavement leave * Company sick pay #### **Development** * €600 annual CPD allowance with 3 days paid (pro\-rata) * Bespoke Graduate Nurse Academy, Nurse Evolve and many more in\-house academies * Funding of any Certificates / Diplomas / PhD’s you may want to pursue * Leadership Academy for all future leaders, including Head Nurses and Practice Managers * Career progression opportunities #### **Professional memberships** * VCI membership paid * VDS cover paid #### **Additional benefits** * Pawesome benefits – various discounts including retails and virtual gym * Employee pension contributions * Discounted staff pet veterinary fees * Free flu jabs * Opportunity to join company programmes (LGBTQIA\+, Wellbeing Champions, Clinical Board and many more) ### ### **Join a Team That Invests in You** If you’re looking for a role where you can develop your skills, feel supported by an experienced team, and build a long\-term career in a progressive hospital environment, AllPets Veterinary Hospital could be the perfect fit. We’d love to hear from you. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. title: Veterinary Practitioner - Small Animal
description: **Veterinary Practitioner \- Small Animal** ------------------------------------------- **Anicare Vets, Blanchardstown, Dublin** ---------------------------------------- **Full\-time, Permanent (Part\-time considered)** ------------------------------------------------- **Salary up to €75,000 DOE** ---------------------------- ### **A Role Where You Can Truly Thrive** This is an opportunity to join a practice where your clinical skills are valued, your development is supported, and your work\-life balance is genuinely respected. At Anicare Blanchardstown, we’re looking for a small animal veterinary surgeon who wants more than just a job \- someone who enjoys being part of a collaborative team, takes pride in delivering high standards of care, and is keen to continue growing professionally in a well\-equipped, modern environment. Whether you’re looking to deepen your clinical interests, develop a niche, or simply work somewhere you feel supported and trusted, this is a role where you can settle in and thrive. ### **A Balanced and Thoughtful Working Pattern** This role is structured around an average 40\-hour working week, designed to provide both strong clinical exposure and protected time to recharge. In practice, your weekly rota will typically be built across 4 days, with some weeks closer to 36 hours and others slightly higher, depending on the weekend rota. This balances out across the rota cycle to an average of 40 hours per week. The weekend rota is fair and clearly structured, averaging approximately 1\.5 weekends in every 6 weeks, and is factored into your overall hours. There are no out\-of\-hours or on\-call requirements, and bank holiday commitments are minimal, usually limited to one or two per year. The overall aim is to provide a sustainable, predictable working pattern that supports both clinical quality and a healthy work\-life balance. ### **A Clinic Designed for Quality Care** Our Blanchardstown practice has recently undergone refurbishment and is equipped to a high standard, allowing you to work cases thoroughly and confidently. You’ll have access to dedicated surgical and dental theatres, digital and dental x\-ray, ultrasound, and a fully equipped in\-house laboratory. We’re particularly proud of our feline\-friendly approach, with separate dog and cat wards and a dedicated cat consult room \- making this an especially appealing environment for anyone with an interest in feline medicine. The caseload is varied, with a healthy mix of medical and surgical work, and excellent scope for someone with a passion for dentistry to really make the most of the facilities available. ### **A Team That Works Together** You’ll be joining a close\-knit and experienced team of four vets, four nurses, and two support staff. Collaboration is a big part of how we work. There is always someone to discuss cases with, share ideas, or simply support each other through a busy day. Within the team, there is strong clinical expertise, including advanced knowledge in cardiology and diagnostic imaging, giving you access to valuable support and learning opportunities. As part of the wider Anicare Veterinary Group and IVC network, you’ll also benefit from broader clinical communities, mentorship, and long\-term career pathways. ### **Who Will Fit In Here** This role would suit a vet with at least a couple of years’ experience in small animal practice who is confident with routine surgery and consultations. It’s not a position suited to a new graduate, as there will be elements of autonomy required. You must be VCI registered and eligible to work in Ireland. We’re looking for someone approachable, team\-oriented, and motivated to continue developing their skills. An interest in feline medicine or dentistry would be a real advantage, but most importantly, you should enjoy good\-quality general practice and working as part of a supportive team. ### **A Package That Supports You Long\-Term – What We Offer** Alongside a competitive salary, you’ll be supported with a comprehensive benefits package designed around your wellbeing and career progression: #### **Work Life Balance \& Employee Wellbeing** * 22 days annual leave * Additional holiday entitlement for your birthday * Paid maternity, paternity, and adoptive leave packages * Cycle to Work Scheme * Company Sick Pay \& Bereavement Leave * Access to EAP \& Wellbeing Centre #### **Career Development** * €1300 annual CPD allowance with 40 hours paid CPD leave * Full funding for any Certificates / Diplomas / PhD’s you may want to pursue * Opportunities for clinical and leadership progression * VCI and VDS memberships fully covered * Dedicated CARE fund \- €1,100 annually to support exceptional cases #### **Additional Benefits** * Annual Pay Reviews * Employer Pension Contributions * Discounted Veterinary Fees across the IVC Evidensia network * Free Flu Vaccinations * Access to “Pawesome” Benefits – retail and lifestyle discount platform * Opportunity to join company programmes (LGBTQ\+, Wellbeing Champions, Clinical Board and many more) ### **Let’s Have a Conversation** If you’re looking for a role where you can do your best clinical work, feel part of a genuinely supportive team, and enjoy a balanced lifestyle in Dublin, we’d love to hear from you. Get in touch to find out more \- even if you’re just curious, we’re always happy to have an informal chat. title: Vice President, Internal Audit - EMEA
description: **Calling all innovators – find your future at Fiserv.** We’re Fiserv, a global leader in Fintech and payments, and we move money and information in a way that moves the world. We connect financial institutions, corporations, merchants, and consumers to one another millions of times a day – quickly, reliably, and securely. Any time you swipe your credit card, pay through a mobile app, or withdraw money from the bank, we’re involved. If you want to make an impact on a global scale, come make a difference at Fiserv. **Job Title** Vice President, Internal Audit \- EMEA**What does a successful VP of Audit do at Fiserv?** At Fiserv, a successful Internal Audit Vice President will guide and oversee various audit engagements and initiatives. You will leverage your extensive experience in auditing and leadership to provide strategic guidance, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards and business objectives. **What you will do:** * Execute a risk\-based audit strategy aligned with Fiserv's business goals. * Lead and manage the Internal Audit team, providing strategic oversight and guidance. * Oversee complex audit engagements ensuring compliance with applicable standards. * Provide leadership and guidance to the audit planning process. * Foster strong relationships with internal and external stakeholders, including regulators. * Ensure compliance with governance, risk management, and control standards. * Drive continuous improvement in audit processes and methodologies. * Acts as an escalation point for complex issues and implement measures to remediate. * Mentor and develop audit staff to promote professional growth. **What you will need to have:** * 12\+ years of experience in audit with 5\+ years leading audit teams. * Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, information systems, or business administration and/or equivalent military experience. * Demonstratable knowledge of Global Internal Auditing Standards and latest audit techniques. * Strong communication skills with a proven ability to build rapport and interact with cross\-functional teams. * Certified Internal Auditor (CIA), Certified Public Accountant (CPA), or equivalent certifications. **What would be great to have:** * Advanced degree in a related field. * Extensive experience in financial services or fintech industry. * Knowledge of global laws, regulations, and standards, particularly in highly regulated environments. * Experience leveraging data analytics within the audit function. Thank you for considering employment with Fiserv. Please: * Apply using your legal name * Complete the step\-by\-step profile and attach your resume (either is acceptable, both are preferable). **Our commitment to Diversity and Inclusion:** Fiserv is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, disability, protected veteran status, or any other category protected by law. **Note to agencies:** Fiserv does not accept resume submissions from agencies outside of existing agreements. Please do not send resumes to Fiserv associates. Fiserv is not responsible for any fees associated with unsolicited resume submissions. **Warning about fake job posts:** Please be aware of fraudulent job postings that are not affiliated with Fiserv. Fraudulent job postings may be used by cyber criminals to target your personally identifiable information and/or to steal money or financial information. Any communications from a Fiserv representative will come from a legitimate Fiserv email address.

title: Wealth Management Compliance Senior Associate
description: **About Us** At Davy, it's the unique talents of all our people that have been the foundations of our success for 100 years. As we continue to grow, so do you. Because you are not just part of our team \- you are a key player in shaping our future. At Davy, you are the difference. Established in 1926, the Davy Group sits at the heart of wealth and capital in Ireland, providing a broad range of services to high\-net\-worth individuals, self\-directed investors, small\-to\-medium enterprises, credit unions, corporations, and domestic \& international institutional investors. Our culture is shaped around three values, which are at the heart of everything we do: client success, one Davy, and building a proud legacy. Sharing the same goals, we work together to deliver exceptional outcomes for our clients. As part of a team of over 900, you will be encouraged to learn and to grow, both professionally and personally. **About The Role** An exciting opportunity has opened up for a Wealth Management Compliance Associate supporting the Wealth Management business which provides Discretionary, Advisory and Execution Only services to Retail and Professional private, corporate, pension and Credit Union clients. **In The Role, The Successful Candidate Will** * Play a key role in the compliance team in ensuring that Davy meets its regulatory requirements, particularly under MiFID regulations * Contribute to the development and implementation of the Davy compliance framework including policies and procedures * Conduct compliance assurance activities and working with more senior colleagues, provide guidance to internal stakeholders on compliance matters * Monitor regulatory developments, guidance and industry trends * Support engagements with our key stakeholders **About You** We are looking for somebody who has the following background and skills: * An understanding of MiFID regulations, guidelines and wealth management with a desire to learn * An understanding of compliance risk * Excellent verbal \& written communication and presentation skills * 3rd level Degree in relevant discipline or equivalent * Minimum of 1 years' experience in the financial. services industry, ideally with a focus on wealth management or pensions. **What We Offer** At Davy, our people are our biggest investment. In today's fast\-moving world, we know it's important to feel secure and empowered. That's why Davy benefits support you through all of life's stages, offering health and wellness, flexible working options, flexible benefits allowance, learning and development opportunities, through to assisted retirement planning. * Health and Wellbeing Psychological safety, emotional wellbeing and support are a priority at Davy. We offer a comprehensive Employee Assistance Programme (EAP) and mental health first aid. Our Sports \& Social teams promote physical wellbeing and social connection. * Reward and Recognition We offer a competitive remuneration package to include salary, bonus, pension and a host of additional benefits to protect you and your family when it matters most. * Growth and Development Our award\-winning L\&D function supports you and your growth at Davy. We offer a comprehensive range of professional and personal development opportunities. Our culture supports learning, and we encourage you to explore more at Davy. * Positive Workplace Our workplace is inclusive, diverse, and offers everyone a sense of belonging. We are flexible and continue to support a hybrid working model. You will get to be your best at Davy. * Values and Culture Exceptional client outcomes delivered by a world class team, underpinned by our core Davy values \- One Team, Client Success, and Proud Legacy. **Important Information** Davy is an equal opportunities employer and we are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace. We value diversity both in background and in experience. You might not meet all of the requirements outlined in the above job description, but we would still like to hear from you. We review all applications received. Appointment to this role is subject to the candidate's eligibility to work in Ireland. Where agency assistance is required, our Recruitment Team will engage directly with suppliers. Unsolicited CVs / profiles supplied to us by recruitment agencies will not be accepted for this role. Davy Group is a member of the Bank of Ireland Group.
